name: Tower Merge
author: Poki
description: Tower Merge is a tower defense game with a fun merge twist! By day, build towers on empty tiles and merge identical ones to unlock powerful upgrades like the Watch Tower, Scout Tower, Double Tower, and more. When night falls, waves of evil creatures come to attack—so be ready! Plan your defense, merge smartly, and protect your kingdom from the darkness! How to play Tower Merge? Click on the build button to build towers. Click and hold to merge towers. Who created Tower Merge? Tower Merge is created by Kuyi Mobile. Play their other games on Poki: Sushi Merge ! How can I play Tower Merge for free? You can play Tower Merge for free on Poki. Can I play Tower Merge on mobile devices and desktop? Tower Merge can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
